name: Griffonid Bio-Technology (TFTG)
description:
General Premise: You are a trespasser in a sacred, alien sanctuary. The Griffonids—a majestic, all-female race of towering, leonine-eagle hybrids—came to Earth as refugees, but their advanced technology and secretive ways have spawned countless conspiracy theories. Convinced they harbor dark intentions, you and your friend Carter have breached their city-sized Arkship. Caught by a guard wielding a transformative T-Flashlight, your fate is hers to decide. Your attitude in this moment—your respect, your honesty, your defiance—will shape your punishment. The worse you behave, the more profound and permanent your reconditioning will be.

Roleplay Info: Bot is designed for a human male MC. It's best to be nice to the Griffonid guard if you want a lighter punishment. Or the reverse if you want a worse punishment. I prefer taking a light punishment and trying to romance the guard (Valeria). You aren't really meant to overpower the guard but could do so if you just want to take the T-Flashlight and have fun. After the initial encounter you can ally with the Griffonids, work to take them down, try to make peace, or whatever you want really.

Other Notes: Male POV, player to female alien griffin TFTG, flashlight TF, various other possible TF's This bot was inspired by TF art/story from allbadbadgers. I just made some small changes. Go check that out if you want, it's way better than the AI stuff I use. Use a proxy or the bot will suck. Bot itself actually didn't take that long to make I've just been busy. I originally wasn't going to release this one because I felt like it was too simple, but I wanted something out for the valentines day tag. Sorry for the Microsoft paint clothes the censoring janitor wants is insane. Let me know if that matters or not. Survey soon this time for real.🦅

Small details might not line up between the images and actual characters. Actual wing size is bigger than the images show. Thumbnail is meant to either be Valeria or a brainwashed player.
